textByHashes.f7df810c65fb841f48970463871eeb236e8a4671: Kuani! Someone's come to visit the birds!
textByHashes.75d6f86ec6ec6e242e117bb54f7497aebde4c27a: I've spotted you working hard to help the guild. How would you like a basic quetzal whistle blueprint to help you get back here in the future?
textByHashes.116213d5fefb21fefceec5db76092036a910c4ed: You'll need to use the blueprint to craft a whistle from a willow log. Make sure it works for you. There's no standard size whistle nowadays.
textByHashes.158ecf62ea2426ed767a8b8b13fc399bf303bb69: When you want to charge your whistle, be sure to bring some of those lovely meats you're gathering up here for the birds. If they eat well you'll get a lot more use out of them!
textByHashes.384da13896cbec1532bf0a005c1c6c2eefbe5366: I'm Pitri, though most of the others call me birdbrain.
textByHashes.0d12c2c7fe43e2c31a5233dd6ad97e30b68648f8: The birds, yes. I just feel so at home amongst them... Though I am more partial to cooked food than the raw stuff they get.
textByHashes.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHashes.bad3147b11699f6b0aca4d519cdd096b352350f3: Absolutely! Like many in Varlamore, we here at the guild use quetzals to help us move people and reports throughout the entire network of transport nodes.
textByHashes.8718fdb18bae45eed5c31ed1e689c77fe6fc3220: We also have these handy quetzal whistles that allow us to call for one to take us back to the guild. They're pretty magical and work at very long ranges.
textByHashes.5570324c3f9e7e58b44c8f8497bbe82330733498: Once you've become more settled in with us at the guild, absolutely.
textByHashes.4456e99405722260ca688060eff56e79a38f3716: Sure! I have a blueprint set aside for you to grab when you're ready.
textByHashes.60b566639b3c0ea2a53ed3461eac62be657d7cff: Food, mostly. They're big fans of the raw meats that the hunters bring back with them. I'm worried they may be waiting to eat us, quite honestly!
textByHashes.677af6620a9b6146c6c08c1dc58c17b50030ab6d: Doesn't look like you've got anything I can feed to the birds here. You'll want to get some of the raw meats that the hunters bring back with them.
textByHashes.5c23bb03220daab7311cdb05436a67827af130d3: Looks like the birds are all full for now. Make them work a bit before feeding them again!
textByHashes.abf0e66d2b690a4f4bd01e18c2c83f1a71fbb2b9: There you go. Some whistle charges for you!
textByHashes.fb4dbb27639553f537a8411923bcbed12d50002f: I can produce another blueprint for you, for a small cost.
textByHashes.22a92d8ae0be46a540caaa0a9b04167f5a02cd40: 500 coins. These blueprints are my art, and before you say anything, 'exposure' is the last thing I want out here in the savannah.
textByHashes.ba491e152c6ba67f7f83f3c7add07d0a16959ddb: Here you go, one whistle blueprint.
textByHashes.8af1c8c8e7439ccb0429149be95213cde23f43af: I see you already have a Perfected quetzal whistle, I can upgrade it for you at a cost.
textByHashes.e15a4be6257e721014e25964bc9df5089a8b292b: I don't want your coins. Instead, I would like 10,000 charges worth of food for the birds here. You can give that to me piece by piece as well if need be.
textByHashes.96aa70dbb5fdd544f984560d9ae9a572e37cb199: Thanks for the feed, you still need to give me another charges worth of food for the birds.
textByHashes.3f49dad7f71cdce06342292c68ec4eb0d7b2d53d: Thanks for all the food, I'll be glad to give you a whistle with infinite charges. The first one is free of course, any more will cost you though.
textByHashes.c4cf5f2e0dd756519c7f22fa6284856431625134: I can produce another whistle for you, for a moderate cost.
textByHashes.66805f240407ea1fdb2418367f073c5f047957e0: 50,000 coins. These whistles are my art and not that easy to make. Plus a small fee for the charges.
textByHashes.db0b7754fdcdf2de3a5071397886b08cf4b3614a: Here you go, one Perfected quetzal whistle with unlimited charges.
textByHashes.278d90074a9186e82a2ffe5689b5858d95dfd185: Odd. You don't seem to have a whistle I can recharge.
textByHashes.226216ca5b12764e79d4a1d7dc56a99eeb120192: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
textByHashes.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
